top_signals.title: IndiGo Posts Shock Loss Amid Forex Drag, Mideast Turmoil
top_signals.summary: IndiGo, Asia’s largest low-cost carrier, reported an unexpected quarterly loss, amid cost pressures, operational disruptions and softer demand linked to the Middle East conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
